languages.original_text: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

languages.text: "Я приношу извинения, Вольный Торговец. Я забываю, что речь Нунциуса может быть затруднительна к восприятию мирянами".
"I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

languages.text: 「申し訳ありません、ローグトレーダー。ヌンシウスの言葉は一般の人には理解しにくいことを忘れていました」
languages.original_text: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

languages.text: "Ich muss mich entschuldigen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich vergaß, dass Nuncius für Laien mitunter nur schwer zu verstehen ist."
languages.original_text: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss mich entschuldigen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich vergaß, dass Nuncius für Laien mitunter nur schwer zu verstehen ist."

languages.text: «Le pido disculpas, Comerciante Independiente. Olvidaba que los seglares suelen tener problemas para entender a Nuncius».
languages.original_text: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

traits.locale_text: «Le pido disculpas, Comerciante Independiente. Olvidaba que los seglares suelen tener problemas para entender a Nuncius».

languages.text: "Özür dilerim Hür Tacir. Nuncius'un konuşmasının, konunun uzmanı olmayanlarca anlaşılmasının zor olabileceğini unutuyorum."
languages.original_text: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

traits.locale_text: "Özür dilerim Hür Tacir. Nuncius'un konuşmasının, konunun uzmanı olmayanlarca anlaşılmasının zor olabileceğini unutuyorum."

languages.text: « Toutes mes excuses, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'ai tendance à oublier que le discours de Nuncius peut être difficile à comprendre pour les profanes. »
languages.original_text: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

traits.locale_text: « Toutes mes excuses, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'ai tendance à oublier que le discours de Nuncius peut être difficile à comprendre pour les profanes. »

languages.text: “我深感歉意，行商浪人。我忘了努恩修斯的言语对教外人而言可能难以理解。”
languages.original_text: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."

traits.locale_text: “我深感歉意，行商浪人。我忘了努恩修斯的言语对教外人而言可能难以理解。”
